programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 284
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 279
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100 pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 296
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 304
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 251
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions.

The cast then set sail for Guishan Island, eager to see if wild dolphins will make a surprise appearance!

programme.title: Unforgivable - EP 3

programme.title: The Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: Elise is beautiful, funny, and blind. Theo is a seducer but a loser. They love music. But when they meet in the elevator, it's hate at first sight.

programme.title: Heavenly Nomadic
programme.desc: A family of nomads dwelling high in the mountains of Kyrgyzstan doesn't need any of the conveniences of modern civilization in order to be happy. But progress is creeping into their lives regardless, destroying legends and traditions as it comes.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Dutch tycoon Jan dies suddenly in Indonesia, leaving his wife Agathe in shock. Their son and his pregnant wife come from the Netherlands to inherit the family empire and are dismayed to find out that Jan's mistress Siti has a crucial role in his will.

programme.title: Empty Nets
programme.desc: Amir loves Narges and Narges loves Amir. But their hopes and dreams for a life together collide head on with the web of tradition, corruption, and social hierarchy that continues to rule over the lives of a new generation in Iran.

programme.title: Future is a Lonely Place
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his family’s death, Frank stages a crime and turns himself in to infiltrate a prison drug ring. Frank aims to get close to the man responsible for their death, and forms a dangerous bond with a guard along the way.

programme.title: Red Eagle
programme.desc: A Summit between France, England, Portugal and the Pope is to take place in Spain, under the guise of looking for a solution to the conflict between Spain and Portugal; but the ulterior motive is to attack the Kingdom of Spain.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Laras was pressured to express his decision to live without children when his in-laws asked him to adopt a child because he was deemed unable to produce offspring.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.

programme.title: The Voice
programme.desc: To be released from a terrifying voice, Derya must do as it says and follow the one man closest to her, Onur - her boss and childhood friend. Soon enough Derya uncovers some shocking truths about him and is caught up in a dangerous web.

programme.title: Jom Berbuka - EP 3
programme.desc: Celebrities cooking alongside their family member or friend. During this enjoyable experience, the celebrity will get to spend time buying groceries together, teaching and sharing their recipe, cooking method & cooking tips with family members or friends.

programme.title: Resepi Most Wanted - EP 13
programme.desc: A travelogue that showcases the diverse cuisines of different races, ethnicities, and cultures in Malaysia, enriched with humor and illustrations by the two hosts and the local community.

programme.title: Aku Yang Kau Sakiti - EP 9
programme.desc: Delighted that he regained the major project from Badrul with the help of Amanda, Zaki surprises Amanda with an unexpected gift.

programme.title: Aku Yang Kau Sakiti - EP 10
programme.desc: Amanda cooks up a story as to how the housekeeper gets injured, but Raikal and Faris suspect that something is off.

programme.title: Kyrgyzstan - EP 10
programme.desc: Kyrgyzstan is a country that resembles a hidden paradise and is seldom explored. This Central Asian nation is home to 1,001 extraordinary treasures that remain untouched by modernity. With its snowy mountains, sea-blue lakes, rows of white yurts, and hundreds of tame horses, Kyrgyzstan offers a unique experience for travellers.

programme.title: Ini Baru Rare: Iceland - EP 17
programme.desc: Iceland, a sub-Arctic country, boasts breathtaking landscapes and natural phenomena that are rarely found elsewhere in the world. Recently, it has gained recognition among global travelers, becoming a paradise for photographers, 4WD drivers, and enthusiasts of cold climates.

programme.title: Hospital Loveline - EP 7
programme.desc: Dr. Arfan spends time with Sophia’s family and forms a growing bond with them. Meanwhile, Razi’s obsession with Sofia and his insistence that she is his girlfriend cause his mother to worry.

programme.title: Kuih Muah - EP 1
programme.desc: Adam is left heartbroken and conflicted when his parents decide to divorce and close their business. Determined to take action, he resolves to intervene and save both their marriage and their business, even if it means risking his chances of a promotion at work.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S11 - EP 3
programme.desc: The 11th season of Upin & Ipin' will feature new activities like exploring around the village, getting into the imagination world with the dinosaurs and robots, exploring the sea and many more!

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places - EP 16
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.

programme.title: Jom Berbuka - EP 3
programme.desc: Celebrities cooking alongside their family member or friend. During this enjoyable experience, the celebrity will get to spend time buying groceries together, teaching and sharing their recipe, cooking method & cooking tips with family members or friends.

programme.title: Resepi Most Wanted - EP 13
programme.desc: A travelogue that showcases the diverse cuisines of different races, ethnicities, and cultures in Malaysia, enriched with humor and illustrations by the two hosts and the local community.

programme.title: (Live) Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Andai Tiada Suri - EP 3
programme.desc: Hisyam Hamid and Zahiril Adzim from the hit drama Andai Tiada Dia swap scripts for spatulas as they step into the kitchen together. Catch the laughter as they fumble and have fun cooking classic Ramadan favourites all under the watchful and witty guidance of Malaysia's iconic TV Moms.

programme.title: Apa Nak Masak Ni? - EP 3
programme.desc: Hosted by husband and wife celebrities couple in each episode with a concept of ala-ala dramasitkom that focus ontheir daily routine during Ramadan. Their favourite dishes during Ramadan and according to their birth state country.

programme.title: Hospital Loveline - EP 8
programme.desc: Opah is admitted to the hospital again, deepening Sophia’s worry. Meanwhile, Dr. Arfan uncovers discrepancies in the hospital’s financial records.

programme.title: Marina - EP 10
programme.desc: Haqiem keeps his wife’s identity hidden from Datin Zila, leaving her frustrated. Meanwhile, Cik Queen suddenly becomes friendly towards Marina, all while secretly trying to discover where she lives.

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: Warna Ramadan - EP 12
programme.desc: Get tips to style leather accessories with your Raya outfits in GAYA. In SEMBANG, Ustaz Iqbal Abdul Rashid shares his experience observing Ramadan in Australia. HIDANG CARI MAKAN uncovers the most popular drinks at Geylang Serai bazaar. And don’t miss Syarif and Malaque as they complete their mission in CABAR.

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places - EP 16
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.

programme.title: Couple Cosmo - EP 4
programme.desc: Sofea plans to have an extravagant event but Marzuki has plans of his own. The event also risks the secret Ruby and Remy have kept in order to work at Sofea's residence. Remy notices that he is being tracked by gang members. Happy is beginning to suspect something is amiss with Tipez.

programme.title: Melur Untuk Firdaus 2 - EP 34
programme.desc: Firdaus charges into Melur's office to confront Melur and Zachery. He questions Melur if she is carrying his child or Zachery's.

programme.title: S.P.Y. S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: The team investigates a case where 13 Secondary Schools simultaneously received bomb threats and realise the threats may have originated from someone within the school itself! Meanwhile, Yusuf uncovers something unusual at Ben's therapy sessions.

programme.title: S.P.Y. S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: The team investigates a case where 13 Secondary Schools simultaneously received bomb threats and realise the threats may have originated from someone within the school itself! Meanwhile, Yusuf uncovers something unusual at Ben's therapy sessions.

programme.desc: Adam is left heartbroken and conflicted when his parents decide to divorce and close their business. Determined to take action, he resolves to intervene and save both their marriage and their business, even if it means risking his chances of a promotion at work.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 12
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.desc: After witnessing Riqmal alone with Zara in the park late at night, Kathy impulsively leaves town with Gibran for a brief getaway. As doubts grow, Zara begins to suspect that Alisya may actually be her biological daughter.
